headline: Jim Cramer Explains the Role of Teradyne in the Data Center Build Out
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer mentioned the stock during the episode and commented: Then there’s Teradyne. Okay, now this is a little more arcane. This is, it’s up 12%. It’s not new. It’s been a tremendous performer during the data center […]

headline: Here's Why Teradyne Stock Slumped (And Why it Could Be a Great AI Stock to Buy)
summary: The company's recent earnings report didn't quite live up to lofty expectations, but long-term investors might see the recent decline as a buying opportunity.
